knownLimitations: Grok 4.1-fast reasons automatically; OpenRouter exposes reasoning: { enabled: true } — already sent for all primary-lane calls

On OpenRouter, web_search is removed from function tools and replaced by openrouter:web_search server tool (engine: exa — xAI Chat Completions API rejects mixed function/non-function tool types so native engine cannot be used). The model searches autonomously via Exa; no explicit web_search tool call appears in the turn.
